meta.title: Ingrid Ascanio — Miami & Hollywood Mortgage Broker
meta.description: Ingrid Ascanio, mortgage broker at Pioneer Mortgage Funding, Hollywood FL. 20+ years, 50+ lenders: purchase, refinance, FHA, VA, jumbo, DSCR. Hablo Español.

hero.eyebrow: Ingrid Ascanio · Miami & Hollywood Mortgage Broker
hero.titleA: Your mortgage, handled by someone who's seen
hero.body: I'm Ingrid Ascanio — 20+ years in residential lending, former bank underwriter, and your advocate with 50+ lenders. One quick call and you'll know exactly where you stand.
hero.imageAlt: Ingrid Ascanio, mortgage broker in Miami
hero.captionMeta: Serving Miami · Hollywood · all of Florida
hero.trustLine: Answers same-day · Weekends included · English y Español

path.title: Three steps. No mystery.
path.body: This is the whole route — and at every point you'll know exactly where your file stands.

steps.name: Talk to Ingrid
steps.desc: 15 minutes on your goals and numbers. No documents needed yet — you leave knowing what's realistic.

steps.name: Get pre-approved
steps.desc: Documents in, numbers verified, a real letter in 24–48 hours — the kind listing agents take seriously.

steps.name: Close with confidence
steps.desc: She structures your file for the right lender and defends it to the closing table. Then: keys.

programs.title: Whatever shape your life is in, there's a program for it
programs.body: Salaried, self-employed, investor, foreign national — the right question isn't “do I qualify?” It's “which of 50+ lenders fits my file?”

aboutTeaser.title: She was the underwriter. Now she's your advocate.
aboutTeaser.body: BankUnited underwriter, processing manager, and since 2016, Branch Manager at Pioneer Mortgage Funding — plus elected Vice President of FAMP Miami.
aboutTeaser.body2: She knows how the person reading your file thinks, because she used to be that person. And she'll walk you through it the way a neighbor would — in plain language, in English or en español.

buy.title: First home, next home, or the one after that
buy.body: A clear budget before you ever fall in love with a listing.

refi.title: Refinance when the math serves you
refi.body: Honest numbers — including the version where you keep your current loan.

items.q: What does a mortgage broker do that a bank doesn't?
items.a: A bank can only offer its own products. As a broker, Ingrid shops your file across 50+ lenders — banks, credit unions, and wholesale lenders — and matches you to the one whose guidelines and pricing actually fit. You get options; she does the legwork.

items.q: How fast can I get pre-approved?
items.a: With documents in hand, typically 24–48 hours for a verified letter. On a deadline — an open house this weekend, an offer you want to write — tell her and she moves at that speed.

items.q: Do you help first-time buyers in Miami and Hollywood?
items.a: All the time. It starts with a plain-language conversation about what you can comfortably afford, then FHA and low-down-payment conventional options that get first-timers in the door.

items.q: Can you finance investment properties and foreign nationals?
items.a: Yes — both are core to her Miami practice. DSCR loans qualify a rental on its income, and foreign-national programs work without U.S. credit history. Neither needs tax returns the traditional way.
